item.title: STRP x EKI [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRP x EKI [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRP x EKI
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=blue] STRP x Enhanced Kernel Integration v1.0 (3c7d1) Release[/color]
[color=red]### Important Information:[/color]

[color=green]**KernelSU Compatibility:**[/color]
[color=blue]Ensure your KernelSU (KSU) version is at least 10940 to avoid compatibility issues. For abnormal KernelSU versions, integrate it into your kernel as a submodule instead of copying the source code.[/color]

[color=green]**KSU Manager Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]The KernelSU Manager (ksud) version should be 10942 or higher for optimal performance.[/color]

[color=green]**Magisk Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]Verify your Magisk version; it should be 25.0 or above for a seamless experience.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Sources:**[/color]
[color=blue]Installation is supported from either the KernelSU app or Magisk app.[/color][color=green]However, installing from recovery is not supported![/color]

[color=green]**Android SDK:**[/color]
[color=blue]Your device's Android SDK should be 29 (Android 10) or newer for compatibility.[/color]

[color=green]**Supported Platforms:**[/color]
[color=blue]Platforms include arm, arm64, x86, and x64 architectures.[/color]

[color=green]**Debug SELinux Policy:**[/color]
[color=blue]If using a debug SELinux policy, be aware that additional logging may occur.[/color]

[color=green]**Designed for STRP x MODULES:**[/color]
[color=blue]The module is designed for STRP x MODULES, so ensure compatibility with your specific kernel.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Errors:**[/color]
[color=blue]In case of errors during installation, the process will continue, but it's recommended to troubleshoot for optimal functionality.[/color]

[color=#954900]**Version:** v1.0 Stable (3c7d1)[/color]

[color=#988900]**Powered By:** STRP x DEVS[/color]

[color=red]Stay tuned for more updates and enhancements! 🌟[/color]
[read more]
item.description:
STRP x EKI
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=blue] STRP x Enhanced Kernel Integration v1.0 (3c7d1) Release[/color]
[color=red]### Important Information:[/color]

[color=green]**KernelSU Compatibility:**[/color]
[color=blue]Ensure your KernelSU (KSU) version is at least 10940 to avoid compatibility issues. For abnormal KernelSU versions, integrate it into your kernel as a submodule instead of copying the source code.[/color]

[color=green]**KSU Manager Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]The KernelSU Manager (ksud) version should be 10942 or higher for optimal performance.[/color]

[color=green]**Magisk Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]Verify your Magisk version; it should be 25.0 or above for a seamless experience.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Sources:**[/color]
[color=blue]Installation is supported from either the KernelSU app or Magisk app.[/color][color=green]However, installing from recovery is not supported![/color]

[color=green]**Android SDK:**[/color]
[color=blue]Your device's Android SDK should be 29 (Android 10) or newer for compatibility.[/color]

[color=green]**Supported Platforms:**[/color]
[color=blue]Platforms include arm, arm64, x86, and x64 architectures.[/color]

[color=green]**Debug SELinux Policy:**[/color]
[color=blue]If using a debug SELinux policy, be aware that additional logging may occur.[/color]

[color=green]**Designed for STRP x MODULES:**[/color]
[color=blue]The module is designed for STRP x MODULES, so ensure compatibility with your specific kernel.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Errors:**[/color]
[color=blue]In case of errors during installation, the process will continue, but it's recommended to troubleshoot for optimal functionality.[/color]

[color=#954900]**Version:** v1.0 Stable (3c7d1)[/color]

[color=#988900]**Powered By:** STRP x DEVS[/color]

[color=red]Stay tuned for more updates and enhancements! 🌟[/color]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
STRP x EKI
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=blue] STRP x Enhanced Kernel Integration v1.0 (3c7d1) Release[/color]
[color=red]### Important Information:[/color]

[color=green]**KernelSU Compatibility:**[/color]
[color=blue]Ensure your KernelSU (KSU) version is at least 10940 to avoid compatibility issues. For abnormal KernelSU versions, integrate it into your kernel as a submodule instead of copying the source code.[/color]

[color=green]**KSU Manager Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]The KernelSU Manager (ksud) version should be 10942 or higher for optimal performance.[/color]

[color=green]**Magisk Version:**[/color]
[color=blue]Verify your Magisk version; it should be 25.0 or above for a seamless experience.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Sources:**[/color]
[color=blue]Installation is supported from either the KernelSU app or Magisk app.[/color][color=green]However, installing from recovery is not supported![/color]

[color=green]**Android SDK:**[/color]
[color=blue]Your device's Android SDK should be 29 (Android 10) or newer for compatibility.[/color]

[color=green]**Supported Platforms:**[/color]
[color=blue]Platforms include arm, arm64, x86, and x64 architectures.[/color]

[color=green]**Debug SELinux Policy:**[/color]
[color=blue]If using a debug SELinux policy, be aware that additional logging may occur.[/color]

[color=green]**Designed for STRP x MODULES:**[/color]
[color=blue]The module is designed for STRP x MODULES, so ensure compatibility with your specific kernel.[/color]

[color=green]**Installation Errors:**[/color]
[color=blue]In case of errors during installation, the process will continue, but it's recommended to troubleshoot for optimal functionality.[/color]

[color=#954900]**Version:** v1.0 Stable (3c7d1)[/color]

[color=#988900]**Powered By:** STRP x DEVS[/color]

[color=red]Stay tuned for more updates and enhancements! 🌟[/color]
[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

item.content:encoded:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
